writes.tlua(20,13): error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'dup'.
writes.tlua(24,13): error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'mixedGlobal'.

writes.tlua(49,14): error TLUA2454: Variable 'pending' is used before being assigned.


==== declarations.tlua (2 errors) ====
    declare global {
        function use(x: unknown): void;
        function getMaybeNumber(): number | nil;
        declare declared: number;
        declare existingFunction: (x: number) => number;
        declare hidden: string | nil;
        namespace _G {
        ~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'namespace'.
                  ~~
!!! error TLUA2819: Namespace name cannot be '_G'.
            declare rejectedEnvironmentMember: number;
        }
    }
    
==== writes.tlua (6 errors) ====
    _G.fromDot = 1;
    _G["fromElement"] = "text";
    function _G.fromFunction(x: number): number
        return x;
    end
    
    // A type-only global can share its name with one implicit global function.
    interface pairedGlobal {}
    function _G.pairedGlobal(x: number): number
        return x;
    end
    
    function _G.existingFunction(x: string): string
                ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2339: Property 'existingFunction' does not exist on type 'typeof _G'.
        return x;
    end
    
    // Collisions with a type-only global recover on the final merged symbol.
    interface dup {}
    function _G.dup(): void end
                ~~~
!!! error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'dup'.
!!! related TLUA6203 writes.tlua:20:13: 'dup' was also declared here.
    function _G.dup(): void end
                ~~~
!!! error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'dup'.
!!! related TLUA6203 writes.tlua:19:13: 'dup' was also declared here.
    
    // Function syntax and ordinary assignment collide when they jointly declare
    // an otherwise missing global.
    function _G.mixedGlobal(): void end
                ~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'mixedGlobal'.
!!! related TLUA6203 writes.tlua:25:4: 'mixedGlobal' was also declared here.
    _G.mixedGlobal = 1;
       ~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'mixedGlobal'.
!!! related TLUA6203 writes.tlua:24:13: 'mixedGlobal' was also declared here.
    
    bareTable = _G.bareTable or {};
    _G.bareTable.fromQualified = 1;
    
    qualifiedTable = _G.qualifiedTable or {};
    qualifiedTable.fromBare = "text";
    
    // Repeated environment self-access still reaches the canonical global table.
    _G._G.repeatedGlobal = 1;
    function _G._G.repeatedFunction(x: number): number
        return x;
    end
    
    // Deep mixed-spelling guards describe the same canonical entity.
    deepTable = {};
    _G.deepTable.value = deepTable.value or 1;
    _G.deepTable.table = deepTable.table or {};
    _G.deepTable.table.member = "ok";
    
    // A same-named lexical local is not the global guard entity.
    local shadowedGuard = getMaybeNumber();
    _G.shadowedGuard = shadowedGuard or "default";
    local pending: string;
    _G.pending = pending or "default";
                 ~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2454: Variable 'pending' is used before being assigned.
    
==== reads.tlua (14 errors) ====
    local n: number = fromDot;
    local s: string = fromElement;
    local fnResult: number = fromFunction(1);
    local pairedResult: number = pairedGlobal(1);
    local existingFnResult: number = existingFunction(1);
    local declaredValue: number = _G.declared;
                                     ~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2339: Property 'declared' does not exist on type 'typeof _G'.
    _G.declared = "wrong";
       ~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2339: Property 'declared' does not exist on type 'typeof _G'.
    _G = {};
    ~~
!!! error TLUA2631: Cannot assign to '_G' because it is a namespace.
    local qualifiedMember: number = bareTable.fromQualified;
    local bareMember: string = _G.qualifiedTable.fromBare;
    local environment: typeof _G = _G._G;
    local repeatedValue: number = repeatedGlobal;
    local repeatedFunctionResult: number = repeatedFunction(1);
    local deepValue: number = deepTable.value;
    local deepMember: string = deepTable.table.member;
    local guardUnion: number | string = _G.shadowedGuard;
    local dupValue = dup;
    local mixedValue = mixedGlobal;
    local printFunction: () => void = _G.print;
    use(_G.rejectedEnvironmentMember);
           ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA7017: Element implicitly has an 'any' type because type 'typeof _G' has no index signature.
    
    // A declared global is a property of the environment under both spellings,
    // and narrowing one spelling does not leak through a write to the other
    // (the write itself errors: declared globals are read-only).
    use(_G.hidden);
           ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2339: Property 'hidden' does not exist on type 'typeof _G'.
    use(_G["hidden"]);
        ~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2339: Property 'hidden' does not exist on type 'typeof _G'.
    if hidden ~= nil then
        _G.hidden = nil;
           ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2339: Property 'hidden' does not exist on type 'typeof _G'.
        local stillNarrowed: string = hidden;
        use(stillNarrowed);
    end
    
    // `globalThis` is no longer compiler-provided.
    use(globalThis);
        ~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'globalThis'.
    type RemovedGlobalThis = typeof globalThis;
                                    ~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'globalThis'.
    
    // Deep writes require an existing canonical global root.
    _G.missing.member = 1;
       ~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA7017: Element implicitly has an 'any' type because type 'typeof _G' has no index signature.
    
    // A lexical `_G` is an ordinary table and does not create globals.
    function shadow(): void
        local _G = {};
        _G.localOnly = true;
    end
    use(localOnly);
        ~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'localOnly'.
    
    // Narrowing crosses bare and environment-qualified spellings.
    maybe = true as boolean | nil;
    local globalKey: "maybe" = "maybe";
    if _G.maybe ~= nil then
        local narrowed: boolean = ((_G.maybe));
        local narrowedThroughStaticKey: boolean = _G[globalKey];
        _G[globalKey] = nil;
        local invalidated: boolean = _G.maybe;
              ~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type 'nil' is not assignable to type 'boolean'.
        use(narrowed);
        use(narrowedThroughStaticKey);
        use(invalidated);
    end
    
    // Static keys normalize even when the keyed spelling is the guard.
    reverseMaybe = true as boolean | nil;
    local reverseGlobalKey: "reverseMaybe" = "reverseMaybe";
    if _G[reverseGlobalKey] ~= nil then
        local narrowedBare: boolean = reverseMaybe;
        reverseMaybe = nil;
        local invalidatedStaticKey: boolean = _G[reverseGlobalKey];
              ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type 'nil' is not assignable to type 'boolean'.
        use(narrowedBare);
        use(invalidatedStaticKey);
    end
    
    // Repeated `_G` self-access has the same flow identity as the bare global.
    repeatedMaybe = true as boolean | nil;
    if _G._G.repeatedMaybe ~= nil then
        local narrowedRepeatedBare: boolean = repeatedMaybe;
        repeatedMaybe = nil;
        local invalidatedRepeated: boolean = _G._G.repeatedMaybe;
              ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type 'nil' is not assignable to type 'boolean'.
        use(narrowedRepeatedBare);
        use(invalidatedRepeated);
    end
    
    // Assignments mint implicit globals whose narrowing spans both spellings and
    // shares one flow-cache key. (The var-declared initialized global and the
    // destructured binding global died with the TS declaration forms.)
    initializedBareFirst = 1;
    local initializedBareFirstBare: number = initializedBareFirst;
    local initializedBareFirstQualified: number = _G.initializedBareFirst;
    initializedQualifiedFirst = 1;
    local initializedQualifiedFirstQualified: number = _G.initializedQualifiedFirst;
    local initializedQualifiedFirstBare: number = initializedQualifiedFirst;
    
    // Guard identity uses the same static-key resolution as flow identity.
    local guardGlobalKey: "guardTable" = "guardTable";
    guardTable = _G[guardGlobalKey] or {};
    guardTable.fromStaticGuard = 1;
    local staticGuardMember: number = _G.guardTable.fromStaticGuard;
    
    use(n);
    use(s);
    use(fnResult);
    use(pairedResult);
    use(existingFnResult);
    use(declaredValue);
    use(qualifiedMember);
    use(bareMember);
    use(environment);
    use(repeatedValue);
    use(repeatedFunctionResult);
    use(deepValue);
    use(deepMember);
    use(guardUnion);
    use(dupValue);
    use(mixedValue);
    use(printFunction);
    use(initializedBareFirstBare);
    use(initializedBareFirstQualified);
    use(initializedQualifiedFirstQualified);
    use(initializedQualifiedFirstBare);
    use(staticGuardMember);
    
==== conflict.tlua (0 errors) ====
    // A source global cannot replace the built-in environment symbol.
    local _G = 1;
    
==== dottedFunctionConflict.tlua (1 errors) ====
    // Replacing the environment through its self-property is the same conflict.
    function _G._G(): void end
                ~~
!!! error TLUA2397: Declaration name conflicts with built-in global identifier '_G'.
